name: deploy_contractor_app
description: Deploy SafeHire contractor app (ai-freelance-escrow-platform) to production for lead finding and monetization. Use no-proof-deployer for full prod with Stripe fees, custom domain via godaddy/vercel. Enable credit system for contractors to buy/redeem leads, flowing into escrow. Second priority after datacenter. Integrate with claims tools for end-to-end (leads -> escrow -> claims?).

steps.description: Use no-proof-deployer full_production_deploy or symbiotic on the freelance_contract/ai-freelance-escrow-platform. Add legal/fee docs, Stripe Connect for credits/escrow fees.
If custom domain (e.g. contractor.grokzilla.site or safehire.com), use godaddy MCP to set records + vercel to add domain. Verify propagation.
Test credit purchase flow (Stripe), lead posting/redeem. Ensure escrow triggers on accepted proposals. Use Linear to track beta users/leads.
Symbiotic: Contractor leads -> escrow -> if dispute/claim, handoff to no-proof-claims.com tools. Update TASK symbiosis.
Connect backend to grokzilla.sites dashboard (artifacts/grokzillafiles). Expose lead/escrow metrics.

symbiotic_protocol: no-proof-deployer (fees + domain) -> godaddy/vercel (DNS) -> contractor app credits/escrow (monetize leads) -> claims tools (disputes) -> grokzilla (dashboard). Only domain input needed for core deploy.
